html:
Exclusive to:

“A 6 slots container for holding Tackle.”

-

The Tackle Box is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is obtained by exchanging 3 Empty Bottles with the Crabby Hermit at level 3 of friendship.

The Tackle Box can contain up to 6 stacks of Floats or Lures (this includes Twigs, Berries, Seeds, Rot, Bent Spork, Hardened Rubber Bung). It can be opened from the inventory or after it is dropped. If you start moving with an open container in your inventory, it will instantly close.

It can be deconstructed using a Deconstruction Staff for 2 Cookie Cutter Shell and 1 Rope.

Spectackler Box

“A 15 slots container for holding Tackle.”

-

The Spectackler Box is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is obtained by exchanging 6 Empty Bottles with the Crabby Hermit at level 9 of friendship.

The Spectackler Box can contain up to 15 stacks of Floats or Lures (this includes Twigs, Berries, Seeds, Rot, Bent Spork, Hardened Rubber Bung). It can be opened from the inventory or after it is dropped. If you start moving with an open container in your inventory, it will instantly close.

It can be deconstructed using a Deconstruction Staff for 3 Cookie Cutter Shell and 2 Rope.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Trivia

  • The Tackle Box and the Spectackler Box were introduced in the She Sells Sea Shells update.

Miscellaneous
"tacklecontainer"
“This extra storage space has me hooked!”
–Wilson
“I usually like my stuff in a state of organized chaos.”
–Willow
“Is good place for fish things!”
–Wolfgang
“At least I won't have to carry bait in my pockets anymore.”
–Wendy
“A PLACE TO STORE TOOLS OF FISH DECIEVING”
–WX-78
“Organized belongings are key to an organized mind.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's not quite like the tackle box I had back home.”
–Woodie
“Can I really even call it a "box"?”
–Maxwell
“A wise hunter treats their tööls with care.”
–Wigfrid
“It's like a toybox, but for fishing stuff!”
–Webber
“I like my tackle to be as organized as my kitchen.”
–Warly
“Glub Glub stuff”
–Wormwood
“Gotta keep your tools organized!”
–Winona
“Hoohoo! What mysteries of fisheries does it hold?”
–Wortox
“What this for?”
–Wurt
“It's got room for all my tackle.”
–Walter
“Finally, my poor pockets can be free of hooks and fish bait.”
–Wanda
“A 6 slots container for holding Tackle.”
-
The Tackle Box is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is obtained by exchanging 3 Empty Bottles with the Crabby Hermit at level 3 of friendship.
The Tackle Box can contain up to 6 stacks of Floats or Lures (this includes Twigs, Berries, Seeds, Rot, Bent Spork, Hardened Rubber Bung). It can be opened from the inventory or after it is dropped. If you start moving with an open container in your inventory, it will instantly close.
It can be deconstructed using a Deconstruction Staff for 2 Cookie Cutter Shell and 1 Rope.

“I had to shell out quite a bit to get this.”
–Wilson
“Bet I could cram a lot more stuff in there.”
–Willow
“Is even better place for fish things!”
–Wolfgang
“I don't see what's so spectacular about it.”
–Wendy
“A PLACE TO STORE MORE TOOLS OF FISH DECIEVING”
–WX-78
“A place for everything, and everything in its place.”
–Wickerbottom
“Lucy keeps saying I should be more organized.”
–Woodie
“Not the most refined design, but it's functional.”
–Maxwell
“A böunty öf space för my bait!”
–Wigfrid
“We can put way more fishing stuff in there!”
–Webber
“C'est super!”
–Warly
“More Glub Glub stuff”
–Wormwood
“I'll never say no to havin' more room for my tools!”
–Winona
“That's quite a lot to tackle, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Is dangerous, full of fish snacks with hooks on them!”
–Wurt
“So organized!”
–Walter
“I could fit an entire bait shop in there.”
–Wanda
“A 15 slots container for holding Tackle.”
-
The Spectackler Box is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in Return of Them. It is obtained by exchanging 6 Empty Bottles with the Crabby Hermit at level 9 of friendship.
The Spectackler Box can contain up to 15 stacks of Floats or Lures (this includes Twigs, Berries, Seeds, Rot, Bent Spork, Hardened Rubber Bung). It can be opened from the inventory or after it is dropped. If you start moving with an open container in your inventory, it will instantly close.
It can be deconstructed using a Deconstruction Staff for 3 Cookie Cutter Shell and 2 Rope.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Hộp Đồ Giải Trí là một Vật Phẩm độc quyền của Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó có được bằng cách trao đổi 3 Chai Rỗng với Cua Hermit ở cấp độ tình bạn 3.
